channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Makary's departure adds new uncertainty at FDA
item.description: Marty Makary's exit from the FDA removes a controversial figure but may not resolve ongoing challenges at the agency.

item.title: GOP uneasy about White House ballroom funding request
item.description: The billion-dollar Secret Service request is not dead but faces uncertainty as Senate Republicans struggle with it.

item.title: Pacific drills, deals and doubts as Trump visits China
item.description: Early May activities hint at the future of Indo-Pacific security amid U.S.-China competition.

item.title: Louisiana advances map reducing Black representation
item.description: Louisiana senators voted early Wednesday to advance a congressional map eliminating one majority-Black district.
